name: Macamides
summary: Macamides is a fatty acid amides associated with maca. Evidence level: mixed.
description: Macamides (fatty acid amides) from maca show mixed human support; preclinical findings suggest effects on neurotransmitter tone and anti-inflammatory signaling.
safetyNotes: Human tolerability evidence concerns whole maca preparations, whose macamide content varies with ecotype and processing. Isolated-macamide dose-response, adverse-event incidence, pregnancy, breastfeeding, endocrine, liver, kidney, surgery, and medication-interaction safety remain insufficient.
